matrix.ac_text: Given I am a Product Manager, when I access the loan product creation form, then I should be able to enter interest rates, terms, and fees.
Given I submit valid product details, when I save, then the loan product should be created and listed.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given a loan product is created, when I view the product list, then the new product should appear.
Given I am not a Product Manager, when I try to create a loan product, then I should be denied access.
Given I create a loan product, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Customer, when I access the loan application form, then I should be able to enter KYC and credit details.
Given I submit valid application details, when I save, then the application should be created and listed.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given I submit an application, when I view my applications, then the new application should appear with status "Applied".
Given I am not a Customer, when I try to apply for a loan, then I should be denied access.
Given I submit an application, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Loan Officer, when I access pending loan applications, then I should see all submitted applications.
Given I review an application, when I find it eligible, then I should be able to submit it for approval.
Given I find an application ineligible, when I reject it, then the status should update to "Rejected".
Given I submit an application for approval, when I view the application, then the status should update to "Pending Approval".
Given I am not a Loan Officer, when I try to review applications, then I should be denied access.
Given I submit or reject an application, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Checker, when I access applications pending approval, then I should see all relevant applications.
Given I approve an application, when I confirm, then the status should update to "Approved".
Given I reject an application, when I confirm, then the status should update to "Rejected".
Given I approve or reject an application, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not a Checker, when I try to approve or reject applications, then I should be denied access.
Given I approve an application, when I view the application, then it should be ready for disbursement. ---
Given a loan is approved, when I access the disbursement screen, then I should be able to initiate disbursement.
Given I disburse a loan, when I confirm, then the loan status should update to "Disbursed".
Given I attempt to disburse a non-approved loan, then I should be prevented.
Given I disburse a loan, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not a Loan Officer, when I try to disburse loans, then I should be denied access.
Given a loan is disbursed, when the customer views their account, then the funds should be available. ---
Given I am a Customer, when I view my loan applications, then I should see the current status for each.
Given my loan status changes, when I refresh the page, then the new status should be displayed.
Given my loan is closed or defaulted, when I view the status, then it should be clearly indicated.
Given I am not the loan owner, when I try to view another customer’s loan status, then I should be denied access.
Given I have multiple loans, when I view my loans, then each should display its own status.
Given I am a Loan Officer, when I view customer loans, then I should see all statuses. ---
Given I have a loan, when I view the repayment schedule, then I should see all upcoming payment dates and amounts.
Given I make a repayment, when I view the schedule, then the paid installment should be marked as paid.
Given I miss a payment, when I view the schedule, then the missed installment should be flagged.
Given my loan is rescheduled, when I view the schedule, then the new dates and amounts should be displayed.
Given I am not the loan owner, when I try to view another customer’s schedule, then I should be denied access.
Given I am a Loan Officer, when I view a customer’s loan, then I should see the full schedule. ---
Given I have a loan, when I access the repayment screen, then I should be able to make a payment.
Given I make a valid payment, when I submit, then my loan balance should decrease accordingly.
Given I make an overpayment, when I submit, then the excess should be handled as per policy.
Given I make a payment, when I view my repayment history, then the payment should be recorded.
Given I attempt to pay on a closed or defaulted loan, then I should be prevented.
Given I am not the loan owner, when I try to make a payment, then I should be denied access. ---
Given I have an active loan, when I request pre-closure, then the system should calculate any penalties as per product rules.
Given I confirm pre-closure, when I pay the required amount, then my loan should be closed.
Given I request early repayment, when I pay, then my outstanding balance should update.
Given I request pre-closure on a non-eligible loan, then I should be prevented.
Given I pre-close my loan, when I view my loan status, then it should be "Closed".
Given I am a Loan Officer, when I view pre-closure requests, then I should see all relevant details. ---
Given a customer requests rescheduling, when I review the request, then I should be able to propose new terms.
Given I submit new terms, when the customer accepts, then the loan schedule should update.
Given I reschedule a loan, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I attempt to reschedule a non-eligible loan, then I should be prevented.
Given a loan is restructured, when the customer views their schedule, then the new terms should be displayed.
Given I am not a Loan Officer, when I try to reschedule loans, then I should be denied access. ---
Given I am a Product Manager, when I access the savings product creation form, then I should be able to enter interest, minimum balance, and withdrawal rules.
Given I submit valid product details, when I save, then the savings product should be created and listed.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given a savings product is created, when I view the product list, then the new product should appear.
Given I am not a Product Manager, when I try to create a savings product, then I should be denied access.
Given I create a savings product, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Customer, when I access the savings account opening form, then I should be able to select a product and enter required details.
Given I submit valid details, when I save, then the account should be created and listed.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given I open an account, when I view my accounts, then the new account should appear.
Given I am not a Customer, when I try to open a savings account, then I should be denied access.
Given I open an account, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I have a savings account, when I access the deposit screen, then I should be able to enter an amount and submit.
Given I deposit a valid amount, when I submit, then my account balance should increase.
Given I deposit an invalid amount, when I submit, then I should see a validation error.
Given I deposit funds, when I view my transaction history, then the deposit should be recorded.
Given I attempt to deposit into a closed or dormant account, then I should be prevented.
Given I am not the account owner, when I try to deposit, then I should be denied access. ---
Given I have a savings account, when I access the withdrawal screen, then I should be able to enter an amount and submit.
Given I withdraw a valid amount within limits, when I submit, then my account balance should decrease.
Given I withdraw an invalid amount or exceed limits, when I submit, then I should see a validation error or be prompted for approval.
Given I withdraw funds, when I view my transaction history, then the withdrawal should be recorded.
Given I attempt to withdraw from a closed or dormant account, then I should be prevented.
Given I am not the account owner, when I try to withdraw, then I should be denied access. ---
Given the interest posting period arrives, when the system runs the calculation, then interest should be computed for all eligible accounts.
Given interest is posted, when a customer views their account, then the interest credit should be visible in the transaction history.
Given an account is ineligible (e.g., closed), when the system runs, then no interest should be posted.
Given an error occurs during posting, when the process completes, then the error should be logged and reported.
Given interest is posted, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am a Customer, when I view my account statement, then I should see all interest postings. ---
Given I am a Customer, when I view my savings accounts, then I should see the current status for each account.
Given my account status changes, when I refresh the page, then the new status should be displayed.
Given my account is dormant or closed, when I try to transact, then I should be prevented.
Given I have multiple accounts, when I view them, then each should display its own status.
Given I am not the account owner, when I try to view another customer’s account status, then I should be denied access.
Given I am a Bank Officer, when I view customer accounts, then I should see all statuses. ---
Given I have a savings account, when I attempt a transaction within my limit, then the transaction should proceed.
Given I attempt a transaction above my limit, when I submit, then I should receive an alert or require approval.
Given I reach my daily/monthly transaction frequency, when I attempt another transaction, then I should be prevented.
Given my transaction limit changes, when I view my account, then the new limit should be displayed.
Given I am a Bank Officer, when a customer exceeds their limit, then I should receive a notification.
Given I attempt a transaction, when I exceed any rule, then the system should log the attempt. ---
Given I am a Product Manager, when I access the term deposit product creation form, then I should be able to enter tenure, interest, and payout frequency.
Given I submit valid product details, when I save, then the term deposit product should be created and listed.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given a term deposit product is created, when I view the product list, then the new product should appear.
Given I am not a Product Manager, when I try to create a term deposit product, then I should be denied access.
Given I create a term deposit product, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Customer, when I access the term deposit account opening form, then I should be able to select a product and enter required details.
Given I submit valid details, when I save, then the account should be created and listed.
Given I fund my account, when I submit a valid amount, then the account should be funded and the balance updated.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given I am not a Customer, when I try to open a term deposit account, then I should be denied access.
Given I open or fund an account, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given a term deposit reaches maturity, when the date arrives, then the customer should be notified and options for renewal or withdrawal should be presented.
Given a customer requests premature withdrawal, when the request is valid, then the system should calculate reduced interest as per policy.
Given a premature withdrawal is processed, when I view the account, then the balance and interest should reflect the policy.
Given a customer requests withdrawal on a non-eligible account, then the system should prevent the action.
Given a withdrawal is processed, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am a Customer, when I view my account, then I should see all withdrawal options and their implications. ---
Given the interest payout period arrives, when the system runs the calculation, then interest should be computed for all eligible term deposits.
Given interest is paid out, when a customer views their account, then the interest credit should be visible in the transaction history.
Given an account is ineligible (e.g., closed), when the system runs, then no interest should be paid.
Given an error occurs during payout, when the process completes, then the error should be logged and reported.
Given interest is paid out, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am a Customer, when I view my account statement, then I should see all interest payouts. ---
Given my term deposit matures, when I access my account, then I should see options to renew or close the deposit.
Given I choose to renew, when I confirm, then a new term should begin with updated details.
Given I choose to close, when I confirm, then the funds should be transferred to my designated account.
Given I do not act at maturity, when the grace period ends, then the system should follow the default policy (e.g., auto-renew or close).
Given I renew or close my deposit, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not the account owner, when I try to renew or close, then I should be denied access. ---
Given I am a Product Manager, when I access the borrowing product creation form, then I should be able to enter lender, terms, and rates.
Given I submit valid product details, when I save, then the borrowing product should be created and listed.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given a borrowing product is created, when I view the product list, then the new product should appear.
Given I am not a Product Manager, when I try to create a borrowing product, then I should be denied access.
Given I create a borrowing product, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Treasury Officer, when I access the borrowing application form, then I should be able to select a product and enter required details.
Given I submit valid application details, when I save, then the application should be created and listed.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given I submit an application, when I view my applications, then the new application should appear with status "Applied".
Given I am not a Treasury Officer, when I try to apply for borrowings, then I should be denied access.
Given I submit an application, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Checker, when I access borrowing applications pending approval, then I should see all relevant applications.
Given I approve an application, when I confirm, then the status should update to "Approved".
Given I reject an application, when I confirm, then the status should update to "Rejected".
Given I approve or reject an application, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not a Checker, when I try to approve or reject applications, then I should be denied access.
Given I approve an application, when I view the application, then it should be ready for drawdown. ---
Given a borrowing is approved, when I access the drawdown screen, then I should be able to initiate drawdown.
Given I draw down funds, when I confirm, then the borrowing status should update and the funds should be available.
Given I make a repayment, when I submit, then the borrowing balance should decrease accordingly.
Given I attempt to draw down or repay on a non-approved borrowing, then I should be prevented.
Given I draw down or repay, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not a Treasury Officer, when I try to draw down or repay, then I should be denied access. ---
Given I am a Treasury Officer, when I view borrowings, then I should see the current status for each.
Given a borrowing status changes, when I refresh the page, then the new status should be displayed.
Given a borrowing is repaid or defaulted, when I view the status, then it should be clearly indicated.
Given I have multiple borrowings, when I view them, then each should display its own status.
Given I am not a Treasury Officer, when I try to view borrowings, then I should be denied access.
Given I am an Auditor, when I view borrowings, then I should see all statuses. ---
Given I am a Maker, when I complete a transaction or product change, then I should be able to submit it for approval.
Given I submit an item, when I view the approval queue, then the item should appear as "Pending".
Given I submit an invalid or incomplete item, when I try to submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given I submit an item, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not a Maker, when I try to submit items for approval, then I should be denied access.
Given I submit an item, when I view my submissions, then I should see their current status. ---
Given I am a Checker, when I access the approval queue, then I should see all items pending my review.
Given I approve an item, when I confirm, then the item status should update to "Approved".
Given I reject an item, when I confirm, then the item status should update to "Rejected".
Given I approve or reject an item, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not a Checker, when I try to approve or reject items, then I should be denied access.
Given I review an item, when I view its details, then all relevant information should be displayed. ---
Given a Maker submits an item, when a Checker reviews it, then the system should verify they are different users.
Given the same user attempts to approve their own submission, then the system should prevent the action.
Given I am a Checker, when I view the approval queue, then I should not see items I submitted.
Given I am a Maker, when I view the approval queue, then I should not be able to approve my own items.
Given an item is approved, when I view the audit log, then the maker and checker should be recorded as different users.
Given I am an Auditor, when I review approvals, then I should see evidence of independence. ---
Given I am a User with approval responsibilities, when an item is submitted for approval, then I should receive a notification.
Given I have pending approvals, when I log in, then I should see a summary of pending items.
Given I act on a pending approval, when I approve or reject, then the notification should be cleared.
Given I dismiss a notification, when I refresh, then it should not reappear.
Given I click a notification, when it relates to an item, then I should be taken to the relevant approval screen.
Given I have no pending approvals, when I log in, then I should not see any approval notifications. ---
Given an approval action occurs, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded with timestamp and user.
Given I am an Auditor, when I access the audit log, then I should see all approval actions.
Given I am not an Auditor, when I try to access the audit log, then I should be denied.
Given I search the audit log, when I enter criteria, then matching approval actions should be displayed.
Given I export the audit log, when I confirm, then I should receive a file with the log data.
Given I perform a non-approval action, when I view the audit log, then it should not appear in the approval audit trail. ---
Given I am a Loan Officer, when I access the payee management screen, then I should be able to create new payees.
Given I submit valid payee details, when I save, then the payee should be created and listed.
Given I enter invalid or incomplete details, when I submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given I edit a payee, when I save changes, then the payee details should update.
Given I am not a Loan Officer, when I try to manage payees, then I should be denied access.
Given I create or edit a payee, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded. ---
Given I am a Loan Officer, when I view a loan account, then I should see options to link or unlink payees.
Given I link a payee, when I confirm, then the payee should be associated with the loan account.
Given I unlink a payee, when I confirm, then the payee should be removed from the loan account.
Given I link an invalid or unvalidated payee, then I should be prevented.
Given I link or unlink a payee, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not a Loan Officer, when I try to link payees, then I should be denied access. ---
Given a payee is created, when I attempt to link, then the system should check payee validation status.
Given a payee is not validated, when I try to link, then I should be prevented and shown a message.
Given a payee is validated, when I link, then the action should proceed.
Given a payee is validated, when I view the payee list, then the status should be indicated.
Given I validate a payee, when I confirm, then the payee status should update and be logged.
Given I am not authorized, when I try to validate payees, then I should be denied access. ---
Given I am a Loan Officer, when I access a payee, then I should be able to update details and status.
Given I update payee details, when I save, then the changes should be reflected in the payee record.
Given I update payee status, when I save, then the status should update and be visible.
Given I enter invalid data, when I try to save, then I should see validation errors.
Given I update a payee, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not a Loan Officer, when I try to update payees, then I should be denied access. ---
Given I am a Customer, when I access the transfer screen, then I should be able to select source and destination accounts and enter an amount.
Given I submit a valid transfer, when I confirm, then the transfer should be initiated and status set to "Pending" or "Completed".
Given I submit an invalid transfer, when I try to submit, then I should see validation errors.
Given I initiate a transfer, when I view my transfer history, then the transfer should be recorded.
Given I attempt to transfer from a closed or restricted account, then I should be prevented.
Given I am not the account owner, when I try to initiate a transfer, then I should be denied access. ---
Given I initiate a transfer within my limit, when I submit, then the transfer should proceed without additional approval.
Given I initiate a transfer above my limit, when I submit, then the transfer should require approval before completion.
Given my transfer limit changes, when I view the transfer screen, then the new limit should be displayed.
Given I attempt a transfer above the limit, when I submit, then I should be notified of the approval requirement.
Given a transfer requires approval, when I view the approval queue, then the transfer should appear as pending.
Given I am an Admin, when I update transfer limits, then the changes should apply system-wide. ---
Given I am a Checker, when I access the transfer approval queue, then I should see all transfers pending my review.
Given I approve a transfer, when I confirm, then the transfer status should update to "Completed".
Given I reject a transfer, when I confirm, then the transfer status should update to "Rejected".
Given I approve or reject a transfer, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded.
Given I am not a Checker, when I try to approve or reject transfers, then I should be denied access.
Given I review a transfer, when I view its details, then all relevant information should be displayed. ---
Given I am a Customer, when I view my transfer history, then I should see the current status for each transfer.
Given a transfer status changes, when I refresh the page, then the new status should be displayed.
Given a transfer fails, when I view the status, then it should be clearly indicated with a reason.
Given I have multiple transfers, when I view them, then each should display its own status.
Given I am not the account owner, when I try to view another customer’s transfers, then I should be denied access.
Given I am a Bank Officer, when I view transfers, then I should see all statuses. ---
Given I am not authenticated, when I try to access any product or transaction screen, then I should be redirected to login.
Given I am authenticated, when I access a screen, then my permissions should be checked before access is granted.
Given I lack authorization, when I try to perform an action, then I should be denied access.
Given I am authenticated and authorized, when I perform an action, then it should proceed.
Given I am an Admin, when I update user roles, then permissions should update accordingly.
Given I am a User, when my session expires, then I should be logged out and required to re-authenticate. ---
Given a critical action occurs, when I view the audit log, then the action should be recorded with timestamp and user.
Given I am an Auditor, when I access the audit log, then I should see all actions.
Given I am not an Auditor, when I try to access the audit log, then I should be denied.
Given I search the audit log, when I enter criteria, then matching actions should be displayed.
Given I export the audit log, when I confirm, then I should receive a file with the log data.
Given I perform a non-critical action, when I view the audit log, then it should not appear in the critical audit trail. ---
Given I am an Admin, when I access configuration settings, then I should see options for approval levels and transaction limits.
Given I update approval levels, when I save, then the new levels should apply to all relevant workflows.
Given I update transaction limits, when I save, then the new limits should apply system-wide.
Given I enter invalid values, when I try to save, then I should see validation errors.
Given I update a configuration, when I view the audit log, then the change should be recorded.
Given I am not an Admin, when I try to change these settings, then I should be denied access. ---
Given I am logged in, when I access language settings, then I should see all supported languages.
Given I select a language, when I save, then the system UI should update to that language.
Given I log in again, when I have a preferred language, then the UI should default to that language.
Given I select an unsupported language, when I save, then I should see an error.
Given I am not logged in, when I try to change language, then I should be redirected to login.
Given I change my language, when I view the UI, then all labels and messages should be translated. ---
Given I access the system, when I view the URL, then it should use HTTPS.
Given I submit sensitive data, when I inspect the network, then the data should be encrypted.
Given I am an Admin, when I review system configuration, then encryption should be enabled.
Given I try to access the system over HTTP, then I should be redirected to HTTPS.
Given I am a user, when I use the system, then my session cookies should be secure.
Given I am a security auditor, when I test the system, then all endpoints should require encryption.
